description: CompositionBlue t-shirt made of a cotton/viscose/lurex blend, has a round neck, short sleeves with elastic on top of the sleeves giving it a ruched effect and branding embroidered on the left chest FitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron; Do not iron on decorationsDesigned for the woman of today, this t-shirt from wrangler makes a great addition to your casual wear wardrobe. The short elasticated sleeves enhance your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans or cotton shorts and sandals.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
